ddls:
CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "week_ending" TEXT /* Date of the week ending for the admission data */,
  "hscp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HSCP (Health Service Provider) region */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the patients */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex of the patients */,
  "admission_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of admission */,
  "number_admissions" INTEGER /* Number of admissions for the specified week, age group, sex, and admission type */,
  "average_2018_2019" REAL /* Average number of admissions for the same period in 2018-2019 */,
  "percent_variation" REAL /* Percentage variation in admissions compared to the 2018-2019 average */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Exact date of admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "quality_flag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality flag */,
  "admission_source" TEXT /* Source of the admission (e.g., emergency room, referral, transfer) */,
  "admission_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the admission */,
  "admission_status" TEXT /* Current status of the admission (e.g., admitted, discharged, transferred) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_hscp_id FOREIGN KEY ("hscp_id") REFERENCES hscps ("hscp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_quality_flag_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_flag_id") REFERENCES quality_flags ("quality_flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_admission_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_type_id") REFERENCES admission_types ("admission_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hscps" (
  "hscp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HSCP region */,
  "hscp_code" TEXT /* Code of the HSCP region */,
  "hscp_name" TEXT /* Name of the HSCP region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the HSCP region */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the HSCP */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the HSCP region */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the HSCP region */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the HSCP region */,
  "total_hospitals" INTEGER /* Number of hospitals in the HSCP region */,
  "total_clinics" INTEGER /* Number of clinics in the HSCP region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hscp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages in the group */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the age group */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex category */,
  "population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that falls into this sex category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_types" (
  "admission_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission type */,
  "admission_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the admission type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the admission type */,
  "average_length_of_stay" REAL /* Average length of stay for this admission type */,
  "emergency_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of admissions that are emergencies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_flags" (
  "quality_flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality flag */,
  "quality_flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality flag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality flag */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the quality issue */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the quality issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_group_quality_flags" (
  "age_group_qf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group quality flag */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "quality_flag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_qf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_group_quality_flags_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_group_quality_flags_quality_flag_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_flag_id") REFERENCES quality_flags ("quality_flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex_quality_flags" (
  "sex_qf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex quality flag */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex */,
  "quality_flag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_qf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sex_quality_flags_quality_flag_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_flag_id") REFERENCES quality_flags ("quality_flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sex_quality_flags_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_type_quality_flags" (
  "admission_type_qf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission type quality flag */,
  "admission_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the admission type */,
  "quality_flag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_type_qf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_type_quality_flags_admission_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_type_id") REFERENCES admission_types ("admission_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_type_quality_flags_quality_flag_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_flag_id") REFERENCES quality_flags ("quality_flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the user account */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., admissions, reports) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission the note is associated with */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the note */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_notes_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission the diagnosis is associated with */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* ICD-10 code of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Whether the diagnosis is confirmed */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis_physician" TEXT /* Name of the physician who made the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_diagnoses_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission the treatment is associated with */,
  "treatment_code" TEXT /* Code of the treatment */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "administered_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was administered */,
  "prescribing_physician" TEXT /* Name of the physician who prescribed the treatment */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment (e.g., daily, twice a day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_treatments_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)
